hero.title: Building products through repeatable and tested methods.
hero.subheading: Democratizing product building using AI and simplifying complex processes through intelligent automation. Enabling faster, smarter, and scalable product creation.

validation.title: Idea Validation
validation.description: Get an instant "Build-Ready" score based on our proprietary venture assessment framework.

foundersInvestors.title: Built for Founders. Designed for Investors.

founders.title: For Founders
founders.description: Turn your vision into a venture-backable reality. We provide the infrastructure and talent to build 10x faster while you focus on the market.

investors.title: For Investors
investors.description: We de-risk technology investments. Partner with Crestcode to build your portfolio companies with professional-grade execution.

support.title: Support
support.description: We provide foundational support for existing teams, augmenting capabilities where you need them most.
support.bestFor: Teams needing specific technical or design expertise to accelerate delivery.

codevelopment.title: Co-Development
codevelopment.description: We work alongside your internal team in a shared codebase, accelerating roadmap delivery.
codevelopment.bestFor: Scaling startups that need to move fast without immediate full-time hires.

fullBuild.title: Full Build
fullBuild.description: We handle the entire product lifecycle from ideation to deployment as your dedicated product organization.
fullBuild.bestFor: Solo founders or non-technical teams needing an end-to-end build partner.

cards.title: 1. Building Before Validation
cards.problemDesc: We identify high-potential opportunities, validate them through strategy and market fit, and build scalable ventures with the right product, team, and capital.
cards.solutionDesc: Crestcode validates ideas before development begins, tests demand and feasibility early, aligns the solution with real market needs, and ensures execution starts with confidence, not guesswork.

cards.title: 2. Technical Foundation
cards.problemDesc: Startups often suffer from poor technical foundations that prevent scaling and lead to expensive rewrites.
cards.solutionDesc: We build on enterprise-grade architecture from day one, ensuring your product is scalable, secure, and ready for massive growth.

cards.title: 3. Market Misalignment
cards.problemDesc: Most startups fail because they build products no one wants, misinterpreting market signals.
cards.solutionDesc: Our validation process savings crucial runway by preventing premature scaling and ensuring resources are allocated to proven market demands.

cards.title: 4. Execution Speed
cards.problemDesc: Fragmented handoffs between design and engineering slow down development and dilute vision.
cards.solutionDesc: Our dedicated pods move 10x faster through total alignment, shared codebases, and repeatable engineering frameworks.

cards.title: 5. Capital Efficiency
cards.problemDesc: Raising too much capital too early leads to dilution and loss of strategic control.
cards.solutionDesc: We provide the infrastructure and expertise to reach profitability with minimal burn, giving founders total control.

whyIdeasFail.title: Why **% of Ideas Never Launch.
whyIdeasFail.description: Most startups fail because they build products no one wants, run out of capital before finding product-market fit, or suffer from poor technical foundations that prevent scaling.

problems.title: Building in Isolation
problems.description: Developing without continuous user feedback leads to misaligned products.

problems.title: Premature Scaling
problems.description: Spending heavily on marketing before achieving true product-market fit.

whatWeLookFor.title: What We Look For
whatWeLookFor.subtitle: We are highly selective. Our resources are finite, which is why we only partner with ventures that meet our "Future-Standard" criteria.

criteria.title: Market Scape
criteria.description: TAM over $1B with a clear, underserved niche or a massive inefficiency waiting to be disrupted.

criteria.title: Tech Leverage
criteria.description: Opportunities where AI, Automation, or Proprietary Tech creates a "moat" that is difficult to copy.

criteria.title: Founder Fit
criteria.description: Domain expertise, relentless drive, and a willingness to be challenged as much as coached.

criteria.title: Ethical Moat
criteria.description: Businesses that solve real-world problems and contribute positively to the tech ecosystem.

timeline.title: The Build Timeline
timeline.subtitle: A high-velocity, structured roadmap from zero to market entry. We engineer digital excellence through 6 rigorous execution phases, optimized for performance and scale.

phases.title: Discovery & Requirements
phases.description: Defining core goals and user needs for a scalable architecture.

phases.title: Research & Planning
phases.description: Technical feasibility and formulation of a strategic roadmap.

phases.title: UX & Wireframing
phases.description: Architecting intuitive experiences and high-performance user flow mapping.

phases.title: UI Design & Prototype
phases.description: Crafting visual interfaces that represent the final product aesthetic.

phases.title: Agile Engineering
phases.description: Full-stack engineering through agile sprints and robust infrastructure.

phases.title: QA & Launch
phases.description: Systematic deployment and monitoring with scale-ready architecture.

items.question: How much equity does the Studio take?
items.answer: We operate on a variable equity and cash model depending on the stage of your venture and the level of support required. Our goal is to ensure founders retain majority control and the cap table remains attractive for future investors.

items.question: Do I need to be a technical founder?
How long does the program last?

cta.title: Ready to Build What's Next?
cta.subtitle: Submit your idea or company for review. We evaluate new opportunities on a rolling basis and respond within 48 hours.

footer.description: Building the next generation of digital products and ventures.
